# Clarifications: Remove Claude Marketplace Plugin Install

No clarifications needed — spec is unambiguous.

The specification clearly defines:
- What to remove (marketplace plugin registration and install)
- What to add (npm package-based command file copying)
- Resolution strategy (local workspace first, then npm global)
- What to retain (Agency MCP server configuration)
- Acceptance criteria for both tetrad-development and external environments
